answer_id_original: Itu bisa terjadi karena otak kita kadang mencoba mengisi kekosongan informasi. Misalnya, lihat sesuatu dari jauh dan kira itu burung, padahal cuma daun. Coba dekati atau perhatikan lebih lama, biar otak punya waktu memproses dengan benar. Kalau sering bingung, mungkin kamu lagi capek atau stres, jadi istirahat juga penting.
answer_en: It can happen because our brains sometimes try to fill in the information gaps. For example, if you look at something from a distance and think it's a bird, but it's only a leaf, try to look closely or watch longer, so that the brain has time to process it properly. If you're often confused, you might be more tired or stressed, so it's also important to rest.
